evidence_excerpt: After high-dose IVIg, her neuropathic pain decreased dramatically the next day; two months later she returned to school, and for 3 years since IVIg therapy she has been in good health while on hydroxychloroquine.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Neuropathic pain and neuropsychiatric symptoms improved rapidly after IVIg, with sustained good health over 3 years and no reported residual neuropathic complaints.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: The day after IVIg, a drastic response was noticed, with a significant decrease in her excruciating pain.
Two months later, she went back to school.
Cyclophosphamide was initiated a week after IVIg therapy while the patient was already in remission.
For 3 years since the IVIg therapy, the patient has been in good health receiving hydroxychloroquine.

notes_on_uncertainty: The article presents multiple cases. This extraction corresponds to the 12-year-old girl with SLE and vasculitic peripheral neuropathy. Long-term outcomes are inferred from the reported 3-year good health following IVIg; specific residual deficits are not described.
